narrative:
Jackson 20 (precinct in Stark County) has 809 registered voters, with 54.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.9%, a modest Republican lean of 5.4 percentage points.
